analysis: The project contains multiple UI files across different directories (docs, test-website, github-page). The event.json specifies a theme related to black holes with animated objects, slides, and pages. The docs directory appears to be the main documentation site that should be themed around black holes. The existing to-dos show that CSS, HTML, and JavaScript files need completion for the black hole theme.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a dark cosmic theme including black hole visuals, swirling animations, glowing elements, and space-themed color palette with deep purples, blacks, and star-like whites.
Complete the HTML content to include sections about black holes with animated slides, interactive elements, and a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon.
Implement JavaScript functionality for animated black hole slides, interactive elements, and smooth transitions between sections with proper event handling.
